//: Schema in src/Sim.ExtDemo/ExternalAgent.cs. Agents are registered with the engine via the
//1: B6 obstacle API (AddObstacle / AddMovingObstacle) with a real LATERAL footprint
//2: (latPos = lateral centre +LEFT of travel, width, latSpeed = lateral velocity). ped1 is a
//3: FULL-ROAD crossing: width 0 = full-lane block (the car STOPS dead, does not swerve), and it
//4: is registered on BOTH lanes (blockLaneIds) so a car on either lane stops. latPos/latSpeed
//5: give it its lateral crossing motion (drawn at the engine-consistent position, and the same
//6: value the engine dead-reckons). For the SWERVE behaviour instead, see ext-swerve-demo.
